title: Junior HR Generalist
description:
Junior HR Generalist

Location: Singapore
Employment Type: Full-time
Company: MNC
Department: Human Resources

About the RoleWe are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Junior HR Generalist to join our dynamic HR team. This role will provide broad exposure across core HR functions, supporting day-to-day HR operations, employee lifecycle activities, and various initiatives across the business.

Key Responsibilities

  • Support end-to-end employee lifecycle activities including onboarding, probation tracking, contract preparation, and offboarding
  • Maintain and update employee records in HR systems to ensure data accuracy and compliance
  • Assist with HR reporting, data analysis, and monthly headcount submissions
  • Handle general employee queries and escalate as necessary
  • Coordinate internal HR communications, trainings, and engagement activities
  • Support recruitment logistics (e.g. interview scheduling, documentation)
  • Ensure compliance with company policies and local labor regulations
  • Liaise with external vendors for medical, insurance, and other HR-related matters

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Human Resources, Business, or related field
  • 1–2 years of relevant experience in HR support or administrative roles
  • Familiar with local employment laws and HR best practices
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to manage confidential information
  • Good interpersonal and communication skills
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office; experience with HRIS is a plus

Why Join Us

  • Exposure to regional or global HR practices in a corporate MNC environment
  • Collaborative team with opportunities for learning and development
  • Structured processes and systems to support HR growth

postedCompany.description:
JAC is an international recruitment consultancy with over 45 years of specialised recruitment experience across Asia and Europe. We have over 1,200 expert consultants who have a deep cultural understanding of the local markets they operate in. Combined with our regional network and specialised industry focus we are renowned for placing highly skilled permanent and contracting staff into specialist positions.

In Singapore, we cover the Banking and Financial Services, Corporate Services, Digital and Information Technology, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Industrial, Sales & Marketing sectors. We also recruit for contract roles and have a dedicated team that can assist with hiring for Japanese-language skills.

Our job board is updated daily so you can stay updated on jobs as they become available and find the next best role for you.

EA License number: 90C3026
